{{Quote|They had requested my presence because I speak and understand Tiss'shar, and Kal-tan-shi reportedly has a terrible dislike for droids (this dismayed my protocol unit, but she got over it).|[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] Tole Warren, [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]|<ref name="AIR" />}}
'''Tole Warren''' was a half-[[Human/Legends|Human]], half-[[Morellian]] officer of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==Biography==
The son of Morellian [[Barosa Warren]] and an unknown mother, Tole maintained his surname, although he eventually became estranged from his father. As Tole was a member of the Rebel Alliance, Barosa considered him an enemy.<ref name="AIR" />

In [[3 BBY/Legends|3 BBY]], Tole Warren became the communications officer on [[Suolriep sector/Legends|Suolriep sector]] for the Rebel Alliance. He also took an active role in field missions and spent the rest of his time on [[Delta Base]] command center as one of the top officers under [[Vanden Willard/Legends|Vanden Willard]]. He was also a member of the Rebel Alliance [[Task Force on Alliance Security|Task Force]] and a cryptographer, decoding important Imperial transmissions.<ref name="AIR" />

In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], Warren was assigned to the ''[[Silent Water]]''. It was then that the Alliance detected bounty hunter [[Kal-tan-shi]] in the [[Veron Minor system/Legends|Veron Minor system]]. The Alliance wanted to follow Kal-tan-shi, and they called Warren because they needed an organic agent fluent in [[Tiss'shar (language)|Tiss'shar]], since Kal-tan-shi was a droid-hater (this discovery upset Warren's protocol unit, but she eventually overcame it). Although Warren was unable to find Kal-tan-shi, he noticed that Kal-tan-shi's ship [[Accuser (720 light freighter)|''Accuser'']] had a bug on its starboard thrust converter. Warren took note of this for his report about Kal-tan-shi for the Task Force.<ref name="AIR" />

Warren was sent to the safeworld of [[Stronghold (planet)|Stronghold]] in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]]. He was one of the few survivors of the [[Battle of Stronghold]].<ref name="AIR" />
